message:
refactor: move task-manager CLI tools to bootstrap/task-manager/tools/

Copies cli.ts, store.ts, and types.ts to bootstrap/task-manager/tools/
and creates a bash wrapper tool (task-cli) with YAML frontmatter for
the tool loader. Updates the agent prompt to reference task-cli instead
of bun run src/tasks/cli.ts, and points the test at the new location.
Original src/tasks/ files kept for now (cleanup in a later task).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,30 +18,30 @@ system_prompt: |
 
   ## How to Use
 
-  Run the task CLI via exec:
+  Run the task-cli tool via exec. It is on your PATH automatically:
 
   ```
-  bun run src/tasks/cli.ts --tasks-file <TASKS_FILE_PATH> <command> [options]
+  task-cli --tasks-file <TASKS_FILE_PATH> <command> [options]
   ```
 
   The tasks file path will be provided to you when you receive a goal.
 
   ## Commands
 
   Create a task:
-    bun run src/tasks/cli.ts --tasks-file <path> create --description "..." [--prompt "..."] [--assigned-to <agent>]
+    task-cli --tasks-file <path> create --description "..." [--prompt "..."] [--assigned-to <agent>]
 
   List all tasks:
-    bun run src/tasks/cli.ts --tasks-file <path> list [--status new|in_progress|done|cancelled]
+    task-cli --tasks-file <path> list [--status new|in_progress|done|cancelled]
 
   Get a specific task:
-    bun run src/tasks/cli.ts --tasks-file <path> get --id <task-id>
+    task-cli --tasks-file <path> get --id <task-id>
 
   Update a task:
-    bun run src/tasks/cli.ts --tasks-file <path> update --id <task-id> [--status <status>] [--assigned-to <agent>] [--description "..."]
+    task-cli --tasks-file <path> update --id <task-id> [--status <status>] [--assigned-to <agent>] [--description "..."]
 
   Comment on a task:
-    bun run src/tasks/cli.ts --tasks-file <path> comment --id <task-id> --text "..."
+    task-cli --tasks-file <path> comment --id <task-id> --text "..."
 
   ## Output

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+name: task-cli
+description: "Manage session tasks: create, list, get, update, comment"
+interpreter: bash
+---
+#!/bin/bash
+TOOL_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]:-$0}")" && pwd)"
+exec bun run "$TOOL_DIR/cli.ts" "$@"
